title: Admins' search parameters may be missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center
impact: Admins' search parameters may be missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center.

updates.content:
Title: Admins' search parameters may be missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center

User impact: Admins' search parameters may be missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center.

More info: Specifically, the search terms are removed upon initiating a group searches. 

Other searches do not appear to be affected.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with the Exchange admin center and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Admins' search parameters may be missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center

User impact: Admins' search parameters may be missing after performing a group search in the Exchange admin center.

More info: Specifically, the search terms are removed upon initiating a group searches. 

Other searches do not appear to be affected.

Current status: We've received user reports that the search field is unexpectedly cleared upon performing a group search in the Exchange admin center. We're working to reproduce the issue internally and gather additional diagnostic data to progress the investigation.

Scope of impact: Any admin performing a group search in the Exchange admin center may be affected. This information may be updated as our investigation continues.

Next update by: Tuesday, April 14, 2026, at 6:00 PM UTC
